pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page summarizing projects, articles, events, artists, and providing global search. Acts as the main entry into all sections and routes the header search to the Search Results page.
primary_functions: Access all main sections: Projects, Blog, Community, Shop, Artists, Events, My Library
Use a sitewide search bar to search for projects, tutorials, products, and events
Discover featured projects, recent tutorials, upcoming workshops, and highlighted artists

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Projects' in header navigation or featured projects section CTA
Click 'Blog' in header navigation or on a 'View all tutorials' teaser
Click 'Community' in header navigation
Click 'Shop' in header navigation or a featured product area
Click 'Artists' in header navigation or highlighted artist card
Click 'Events' in header navigation or upcoming workshop teaser
Click 'My Library' in header navigation
Click on a featured project card
Click on a recent tutorial/article teaser
Click on an upcoming workshop card
Click on a highlighted artist card
Submit the global search form in the header

access_methods.description: Main logo and 'Home' link in the header navigation
Directly via root URL or bookmarks to index.html

pages.name: Projects
pages.description: Browse and filter woodworking project plans and builds. Supports deep-linkable filter state for tasks like finding reclaimed wood wall art projects under a specific build time.
primary_functions: Filter projects by category (e.g., wall_art), material (e.g., reclaimed_wood), difficulty, and build time
Sort projects by rating, date, or popularity (e.g., rating high to low)
View project summaries and open full project detail pages

incoming_params.description: Preselected project category, e.g., 'Wall Art' or 'wall_art'
Comma-separated material filter values, e.g., 'reclaimed_wood'
Difficulty preset, e.g., 'beginner'
Maximum estimated build time in minutes, used for build time slider/filter
Sort option key from getProjectFilterOptions.sortOptions, e.g., 'rating_high_to_low'
Pagination index for project results
Optional filter to show only projects from a given artist

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a project card in the results grid/list
Submit global search from the header while on the Projects page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Projects' link in the main header navigation
Filters and sorting encoded in query string to allow sharing filtered views
Linked from featured sections or artist profiles with preset category filters

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single woodworking project, including instructions and materials. Supports saving to collections and generating materials lists such as 'Floating Shelf Build List'.
primary_functions: Read full project details, steps, photos, and metadata such as build time and difficulty
Save the project to a collection: create a new collection or add to an existing one (e.g., Quick Reclaimed Wall Art)
View the materials list and add all or individual materials to a named materials list (e.g., Floating Shelf Build List)

incoming_params.description: Project ID to display on this detail page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the project creator's name or avatar
Click 'View all collections' after saving a project
Click 'View materials lists' after creating a materials list from this project

access_methods.description: Accessed via project_detail.html?id={projectId} from listings or shared links
Sharable project URL from outside the site

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Results page for the global search, covering projects, tutorials, products, and events. Supports advanced filters (content type, difficulty, date range) and sorting for flows like finding wood burning tutorials.
primary_functions: Display search results for a query (e.g., wood burning tutorial or Floating Shelf with Hidden Mounting)
Filter results by content type (project, tutorial, article, product, event) and difficulty (e.g., beginner)
Filter by date range (e.g., last 3 months) and sort results by rating, date, or relevance, then open detail pages

incoming_params.description: Search term entered into the global search bar, e.g., 'wood burning tutorial'
Optional filter limiting results to a type, e.g., 'tutorial', 'article', 'project', 'product', or 'event'
Optional difficulty filter for applicable content, e.g., 'beginner'
ISO-8601 date string for start of date-range filter (e.g., 3 months ago)
ISO-8601 date string for end of date-range filter (typically today)
Sort option key, e.g., 'rating_high_to_low' or 'date_new_to_old'
Pagination index for search results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a search result whose entityType is 'project'
Click on a search result whose entityType is 'article' or 'tutorial'
Click on a search result whose entityType is 'product'
Click on a search result whose entityType is 'event'

access_methods.description: Accessed when the global search form redirects to search_results.html?query=...
Sharable URL representing a specific filtered search

pages.name: Blog & Tutorials
pages.description: Listing page for articles and tutorials, including carving and joinery content. Used to assemble reading plans like the 'Beginner Practice Plan'.
primary_functions: Browse articles and tutorials by category (e.g., carving, joinery), topic, and tag
Filter posts by difficulty (e.g., beginner) and estimated reading time (e.g., 20 minutes or less)
Open article or tutorial detail pages to read full content

incoming_params.description: Selected article category, e.g., 'Carving', 'Joinery', 'Wood Burning'
Difficulty preset for filtering articles, e.g., 'beginner'
Maximum estimated reading time in minutes, used for reading time slider
Optional filter to show only 'tutorial' or 'article' content types
Sort option key from getArticleFilterOptions.sortOptions, e.g., 'date_new_to_old'
Pagination index for articles list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article/tutorial card in the list
Submit global search from the header while on the Blog page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Blog' link in the main header navigation
Filter state (category, difficulty, reading time) encoded in query parameters

pages.name: Article / Tutorial Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a blog post or tutorial, including comments and reading list actions. Used for workflows like commenting on wood burning tutorials and building reading lists.
primary_functions: Read the full tutorial or article, including details like difficulty, reading time, and step-by-step guidance
Add or remove the article from reading lists: create a new reading list or add to an existing one (e.g., Beginner Practice Plan)
View the comments section and post new comments on the article or tutorial

incoming_params.description: Article or tutorial ID to display on this page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View reading list' after adding this article to a list
Click breadcrumb link back to 'Blog & Tutorials'

access_methods.description: Accessed via article_detail.html?id={articleId} from listings or search results
Sharable article/tutorial URL

pages.name: Community Overview
pages.description: Entry point to the forum, listing all discussion categories and subforums such as 'Beginner Tools'.
primary_functions: Browse available forum categories and subforums (e.g., Beginner Tools)
Open a specific subforum to view its threads and start new topics
Read short descriptions and guidelines for each forum area

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a subforum name such as 'Beginner Tools'
Click 'Community Guidelines' link within community description

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Community' link in the main header navigation
Linked from footer 'Community Guidelines' section and other pages

pages.name: Forum Subforum
pages.description: Thread list for a single subforum, with search and new topic creation. Supports searching for existing topics and posting new threads like chisel set recommendations.
primary_functions: View and paginate through thread titles within a subforum (e.g., Beginner Tools)
Search threads within the subforum by keyword (e.g., first chisel set under 100)
Create a new topic by entering a title, main post content, and selecting tags (e.g., chisels, beginner), then publish the thread

incoming_params.description: Subforum ID used to load threads for this subforum
Pagination index for thread list
Sort option for threads, e.g., 'recent_activity'
Search query within the subforum, used when searching for existing threads

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a thread title in the list or search results
Successful submission of 'New Topic' form
Click on the 'Community' breadcrumb link

access_methods.description: Accessed via forum_subforum.html?id={subforumId} from Community Overview or breadcrumbs
Sharable link to a specific subforum

pages.name: Forum Thread
pages.description: Detail view of a single forum thread and its replies. Users can read questions, post replies, and navigate back to the parent subforum.
primary_functions: Read the original question and all replies in a discussion thread
Post replies or follow-up questions to participate in the discussion
Navigate back to the parent subforum using breadcrumbs

incoming_params.description: Forum thread ID to display
Pagination index for posts within the thread

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the subforum name in the breadcrumb
Click on the 'Community' root in breadcrumb

access_methods.description: Accessed via forum_thread.html?id={threadId} from subforum lists or direct links
Sharable direct link to a specific thread

pages.name: Shop / Marketplace
pages.description: Browse and filter wall art and other woodworking products for sale. Used for tasks like assembling a budget wall art gift wishlist.
primary_functions: Filter products by category (e.g., wall_art), price range, rating (e.g., 4_5_stars_and_up), and other attributes
Sort items by price, rating, or popularity (e.g., price low to high)
Open product detail pages to view more information and add items to wishlists

incoming_params.description: Selected product category, e.g., 'Wall Art'
Maximum price filter for products, e.g., 60 for '$60'
Minimum average rating filter, e.g., 4.5
Sort option key from getProductFilterOptions.sortOptions, e.g., 'price_low_to_high'
Pagination index for product results
Optional filter to show products from a specific artist

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card in the marketplace grid/list
Submit global search from the header while on the Shop page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Shop' link in the main header navigation
Filters and sort encoded in query parameters to support shareable product views

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific product from the marketplace. Supports adding items to wishlists like 'Gift Ideas'.
primary_functions: View product photos, description, price, rating, and dimensions
Add the product to a wishlist: create a new wishlist (e.g., Gift Ideas) or add to an existing one
See related or similar items to help plan gift ideas or room themes

incoming_params.description: Product ID to display on this detail page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View wishlist' after adding the product
Click on the product creator's name/avatar
Click 'Back to Shop' link or breadcrumb

access_methods.description: Accessed via product_detail.html?id={productId} from the Shop or search results
Sharable product URL from outside the site

pages.name: Artists Directory
pages.description: Browse woodworking artists and creators, including geometric-style specialists. Used to discover and follow artists based on style and popularity.
primary_functions: Filter artists by style (e.g., geometric), project count (e.g., minimum 5 completed projects), and other attributes
Sort artists by popularity or follower count (e.g., most followers)
Open individual artist profile pages to learn more and follow them

incoming_params.description: Selected artist style filter, e.g., 'geometric'
Minimum completed project count for filtering artists, e.g., 5
Sort option key from getArtistFilterOptions.sortOptions, e.g., 'most_followers'
Pagination index for artist results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an artist card in the directory
Submit global search from the header while on the Artists page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Artists' link in the main header navigation
Style and project-count filters encoded in query parameters

pages.name: Artist Profile
pages.description: Profile page for a single artist, their work, and follow/notification settings. Enables following geometric-style artists and enabling notifications for new projects.
primary_functions: View the artists bio, gallery of projects, wall art pieces, and links to tutorials or products
Follow or unfollow the artist to include them in your personal followed list
Enable or disable notifications specifically for the artists new projects or new posts

incoming_params.description: Artist ID whose profile should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View all projects' on the artist profile
Click 'View products for sale' on the artist profile
Click 'Manage followed artists' from this profile

access_methods.description: Accessed via artist_profile.html?id={artistId} from the directory, projects, or products
Sharable artist profile URL

pages.name: Events & Workshops
pages.description: Browse upcoming events and workshops such as beginner wood carving sessions. Supports filtering for online, beginner, and price constraints.
primary_functions: Filter events by type (e.g., online), topic (e.g., wood_carving), difficulty (e.g., beginner), date range, and price (e.g., under $40)
Sort workshops by date, price (e.g., price low to high), or popularity
Open event detail pages to review agenda, schedule, and requirements

incoming_params.description: Event format filter, e.g., 'online', 'in_person', or 'hybrid'
Event topic filter, e.g., 'Wood Carving'
Difficulty filter, e.g., 'beginner'
Start date (ISO-8601) for the event date range filter
End date (ISO-8601) for the event date range filter
Maximum price in event currency, e.g., 40
Sort option key from getEventFilterOptions.sortOptions, e.g., 'price_low_to_high'
Pagination index for events list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event/workshop card in the list
Submit global search from the header while on the Events page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Events' link in the main header navigation
Filters and sort encoded in query parameters to support shareable event views

pages.name: Event Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detailed view and registration form for a specific event or workshop. Used to complete registrations with on-site 'pay later' style options.
primary_functions: Read full event information, including schedule, instructor, format (online), and pricing
Complete a registration form with personal details (e.g., name, city, experience notes)
Choose a simple on-site payment option (e.g., pay_later or pay_at_workshop) and submit registration

incoming_params.description: Event ID to display on this detail page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Events' after viewing or registering

access_methods.description: Accessed via event_detail.html?id={eventId} from Events listings or search
Sharable event/workshop URL
Registration form submission calling registerForEvent with on-site payment method

pages.name: My Library & Lists
pages.description: Central place to manage saved content: project collections, reading lists, wishlists, materials lists, and followed artists. Supports verifying task outcomes such as the contents of 'Quick Reclaimed Wall Art', 'Beginner Practice Plan', and 'Gift Ideas'.
primary_functions: View and manage project collections (e.g., Quick Reclaimed Wall Art) and open each collection to see saved projects
View and manage reading lists (e.g., Beginner Practice Plan) and confirm which articles or tutorials are included
View and manage wishlists (e.g., Gift Ideas) and materials lists (e.g., Floating Shelf Build List), including reviewing item names and removing items if needed
View followed artists and adjust notification preferences for their new projects or posts

incoming_params.description: Optional tab selector, e.g., 'project_collections', 'reading_lists', 'wishlists', 'materials_lists', 'followed_artists'
Optional project collection ID to auto-expand in the UI
Optional reading list ID to auto-expand in the UI
Optional wishlist ID to auto-expand in the UI
Optional materials list ID to auto-expand, e.g., 'Floating Shelf Build List'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a project inside a project collection
Click an article inside a reading list
Click a product inside a wishlist
Click on a followed artist's name or avatar

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'My Library' link in the main header navigation
Optional parameters used to preselect a specific tab or list
Sharable link to a specific My Library tab or list view

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the woodworking art blog and community, its mission, and how to get started with different sections.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose and focus of the site and its sections
Introduce the approach to woodworking art, reclaimed materials, and learning resources
Provide a brief overview of how to get started using projects, blog, community, and events

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Need help?' link within About content

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' link in the site footer
Directly via about.html URL from outside the site

pages.name: Help & Contact
pages.description: Support center with FAQs, feature explanations, community guidelines, and a contact form.
primary_functions: Provide FAQs on using projects, filters, collections, reading lists, wishlists, and materials lists
Explain forum participation guidelines and community posting tips
Offer a simple contact form or contact details for support or feedback

incoming_params.description: Optional topic filter to scroll to relevant FAQ section, e.g., 'projects', 'collections', 'forum', 'events'

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Help & Contact' and 'Community Guidelines' links in the footer
Submitting the contact form triggers submitContactForm
Direct access via help.html URL

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and global search
View and register for workshops and events
Manage saved collections, lists, and followed artists

footer_links.description: About the woodworking art blog and community
FAQs and ways to get support or send feedback
Information on forum rules and posting etiquette
